# Cooldesk

> The Best Free New Tab Dashboard (No Sign-in Required)

Transform your browser with Cooldesk, the ultimate New Tab replacement. 100% Free - No Sign-in Required. Autosave tabs, share project workspaces, and use AI-powered search.

## Navigation

- [Home](https://cool-desk.com/)
- [How to Use](https://cool-desk.com/how-to-use)
- [Pricing](https://cool-desk.com/pricing)
- [Blog](https://cool-desk.com/blog)
- [Search](https://cool-desk.com/search)
